keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: The word or phrase to search for inside Instagram post captions. Examples: "stanley", "very happy". The keyword is also used (with spaces and punctuation removed) as a hashtag to find candidate posts.

maxPosts.title: Max matching posts
maxPosts.description: Maximum number of matching posts to return. The Actor scrapes more candidates than this and keeps only those whose caption contains the keyword.

sortBy.title: Sort by date
sortBy.description: Order of the returned posts by publish date.

minLikes.title: Minimum likes
minLikes.description: Only keep posts with at least this many likes. Use 0 for no minimum. Posts with hidden like counts are treated as 0.

minComments.title: Minimum comments
minComments.description: Only keep posts with at least this many comments. Use 0 for no minimum. Posts with hidden comment counts are treated as 0.

postedAfter.title: Posted after (from date)
postedAfter.description: Only keep posts published on or after this date. Accepts an absolute date (e.g. 2024-01-31) or a relative value (e.g. "7 days", "2 weeks", "1 month", "1 year"). Leave empty for no lower bound.

postedBefore.title: Posted before (to date)
postedBefore.description: Only keep posts published on or before this date. Accepts an absolute date (e.g. 2024-12-31) or a relative value (e.g. "7 days"). Leave empty for no upper bound.
